name: free-contratos
description: devthomas/contratos — emissor freelance (React) + API REST (Express) + IA Gemini no servidor.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @free-contratos/backend" "npm run dev -w @free-contratos/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @free-contratos/backend && npm run build -w @free-contratos/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @free-contratos/backend && npm run typecheck -w @free-contratos/frontend
